3	Stefan G e o r g i
MODULE 6	Fascinations Written Example
FASCINATIONS
WRITTEN EXAMPLE
WHY…
Why the key to having a year’s worth of life-saving medication is probably
sitting inside your doctor’s storage close right now.
Why one of the first places you should go for medicine during an emergency
isn’t the hospital, but your local farm store. (Hint: there are two live saving
drugs probably sitting in their refrigerators right now).
Why squeezing a common citrus fruit that grows across the Southern United
States can repel mosquitos and most other types of bugs in seconds.
HOW…
How to legally and cheaply stockpile your prescriptions (without it costing
you a small fortune)
How to exploit a “free sample loophole” that can stock you up on your
lifesaving meds, without you having to spend a penny.
How to make an insulin shot substitute for less than $20.
How squeezing a common citrus fruit that grows across the Southern United
States can repel mosquitos and most other types of bugs in seconds.
How to combine Ginger, Horseradish, Garlic, and four more super common
ingredients together to create a “super antibiotic” that destroys the most
harmful bacteria on contact.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

4	Stefan G e o r g i
MODULE 6	Fascinations Written Example
WHEN…
When is the best time to ask your doctor to help you stock up on lifesaving
meds? It’s on the third visit, and you’ll find out why + what to say during this
visit inside the book.
WHAT…
What NEVER to say to your doctor when you’re trying to stock up on a year’s
worth of prescription meds. (Hint: It starts with a three-letter word).
THE “SECRET” BULLET…
The SECRET list of blood pressure lowering herbs that your doctor will
probably never tell you about.
The secret and forgotten meat part that can lower cholesterol fast (hint it’s
not something you find in most restaurants).
THE “LIST” BULLET
15 Essential OTC Medicines You Can’t Be Without If Stuff Hits The Fan
12 common herbs and vegetables to lower your blood pressure
The 4-Step approach to convincing your doctor to give you a year’s worth of
meds, without any headaches, hassles, or feeling awkward. (Hint: It Usually
Takes 3 Visits Before Your Doctor Will Say “Yes.”
The 23 Must-Have Medical Supplies that you should add to your stockpile
right now…and that cost less than $10 total.
THE “NEVER” BULLET
Why you should NEVER use Neosporin as a disinfectant during an emergency
(use this natural oil instead).
Why you should NEVER rely on just an inhaler during a prolonged disaster…
even if you’ve got plenty of backups.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

5	Stefan G e o r g i
MODULE 6	Fascinations Written Example
THE “CONTRARIAN BULLET”
Neosporin is the best way to treat infections, right? Not necessarily. There’s
one natural oil that kills bacteria and fungus much faster, and it could be
growing in your backyard right now (page 39).
15 roadside weeds that can actually be used as lifesaving medicine. (It’s
guaranteed at least one of these grows near where you live right now!).
Think your sore joints are too far gone for help? Think again. This common
tree bark can stop even the most intense cases of arthritis in their tracks
(pg. 71).
THE “NAMED ODDITY” BULLET
The “Mental Filing Cabinet” technique that can keep you rational and calm
during an emergency…even if you’ve been caught completely off guard.
The “Auto-Fill Prescription Loophole” that can have drug companies mailing
surplus supplies of your most needed medications right to your front door.
THE “SPEEDY BULLET”
The insanely popular garden herb that relieves headaches and can stop
indigestion FAST.
The surprising household powder that can quickly stop an asthma attack
once you sniff it (Hint: it’s an aroma you’ve almost certainly smelled in the
last 24 hours)
THE “PLUS” BULLET
Plus…how putting two drops of this common citrus juice onto a cotton swab
can relieve toothaches in seconds.
